title: [BUG] Security Issue : Overly permissive message posting policy
author: praveena23
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Overly permissive message posting policy: function: window.postMessage used

Lib version: 4.4.0

comments.author: protobi-pieter
comments.body: @praveena23 Could you provide additional steps to replicate and other context?
